reason: Low-complexity bugfix: 3 well-defined issues in single markdown file, Tier A + Tier B security pass

changes.title: MCP connectivity -- add TLS error diagnostics to Block 3
changes.description: When MCP query fails with 'fetch failed', run curl diagnostic on Instance URL. If curl succeeds but MCP failed, recommend NODE_OPTIONS: --use-system-ca in .mcp.json env. Distinguish '[FAIL] server unreachable' vs '[FAIL] server reachable but MCP connection failed (likely TLS)'.

changes.title: Remove false-positive read:user scope WARN
changes.description: Pipeline never calls list_my_repositories (confirmed: 0 matches across entire codebase). Remove the read:user scope check entirely. Also clarify step 10 to say 'verify the declared remote exists via MCP' instead of 'list repositories via MCP'.
changes.location: Block 3, step 10 (and any token scope check)

changes.title: Fix trackers.md path resolution
changes.description: Replace bare relative path 'docs/reference/trackers.md' with explicit resolution instruction: locate the ceos-agents plugin installation directory and read from there. Use Glob pattern or known plugin path.
